case_title: RANDALL J REDENIUS VS. ADATOM.COM, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF REDENIUS, RANDALL J AS TO DEFENDANT ADATOM.COM, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
